description: Use the N/runtime module to view runtime settings for the script, the session, or the user. You can also use this module to set a session key and to see whether a particular feature is enabled in your account.

methods.name: getCurrentScript
methods.description: Returns a runtime.Script object that represents the currently executing script.

methods.name: getCurrentSession
methods.description: Returns a runtime.Session object that represents the user session for the currently executing script.

methods.name: getCurrentUser
methods.description: Returns a runtime.User object that represents the properties and preferences of the user currently executing the script.

methods.name: isFeatureInEffect
methods.description: Indicates whether a particular feature is enabled in a NetSuite account.

params.name: options.feature
params.description: The internal ID of the feature to check (e.g. 'MULTISUBSIDIARY').

methods.name: accountId
methods.description: Returns the account ID for the current user.

methods.name: country
methods.description: Returns the country for the current company.

methods.name: envType
methods.description: Returns the current environment in which the script is executing. Uses values from runtime.EnvType.

methods.name: executionContext
methods.description: Returns the trigger of the current script. Uses values from runtime.ContextType.

methods.name: processorCount
methods.description: Returns the number of processors available to the current account.

methods.name: queueCount
methods.description: Returns the number of scheduled script queues available to the current account.

methods.name: version
methods.description: Returns the version of NetSuite that the method is called in (e.g. '2023.2').

enums.name: ContextType
enums.description: Holds the execution context values for script triggers. This is the type for the runtime.executionContext property.

enums.name: EnvType
enums.description: Holds all possible environment types that the current script can execute in. This is the type for the runtime.envType property.

enums.name: Permission
enums.description: Holds the user permission level for a specific permission ID. This is the type returned by the User.getPermission(options) method.

objectTypes.name: Script
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the runtime settings of the currently executing script.

methods.name: getParameter
methods.description: Returns the value of a script parameter for the currently executing script.

methods.name: getRemainingUsage
methods.description: Returns the number of units remaining (per governance limitations) for the currently executing script.

properties.name: bundleIds
properties.description: An array of bundle IDs for the bundles that include the currently executing script.

properties.name: deploymentId
properties.description: The deployment ID for the script deployment of the currently executing script.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The script ID for the currently executing script.

properties.name: logLevel
properties.description: The script logging level for the currently executing script.

properties.name: percentComplete
properties.description: The percent complete for the current scheduled script execution.

objectTypes.name: Session
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the user session for the currently executing script.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns the user-defined session object value associated with the session object key.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The key used to store the session object value.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets a key and value for a user-defined session object.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The key used to store the session object value.

objectTypes.name: User
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the properties and preferences of the user currently executing the script.

methods.name: getPermission
methods.description: Returns a runtime.Permission user permission level for the specified permission.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The internal ID of the permission to check.

methods.name: getPreference
methods.description: Returns the value of a NetSuite preference. Currently only General Preferences and Accounting Preferences are exposed in SuiteScript.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The internal ID of the preference.

properties.name: contact
properties.description: The internal ID of the currently logged-in contact.

properties.name: department
properties.description: The internal ID of the department for the current user.

properties.name: email
properties.description: The email address of the current user.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID of the current user.

properties.name: location
properties.description: The internal ID of the location of the current user.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the current user.

properties.name: role
properties.description: The internal ID of the role for the current user.

properties.name: roleCenter
properties.description: The string value of the center type, or role center, for the current user.

properties.name: roleId
properties.description: The custom scriptId of the role for the current user.

properties.name: subsidiary
properties.description: The internal ID of the subsidiary for the current user.
